metadata.uc_code_format: PB-LAH-UC001 to PB-LAH-UC151 (identical to Transport v1.5)
metadata.ensemble_result: Tested and disproved — solo Holt-Winters beats Top-3 ensemble

residential.source: HOTOSM building footprints / PBS population / distance-decay

honest_limitations: Temporal profile identical across all UCs — only magnitude differs by weight
No within-UC heterogeneity in building age, thermal efficiency, or gas access rate
CI bounds reflect city-level HW forecast uncertainty, not spatial uncertainty
Non-residential Identity R²=1.0 (ClimateTrace EF×Activity = constant) — HW used for trend projection only
HOTOSM buildings all tagged 'yes' → residential/commercial split uses T3 distance-decay for commercial

risk_flag_definitions.RF2_fuel_poverty_risk: peripheral UC (dist>15.0km) with high residential weight

city_forecast.note_other_sector: The 'other' sector (mean=6,949 t/mo) is EXCLUDED from UC-level disaggregation. DataQualityGate flagged it as DEGENERATE (SNaive MAPE=0%: constant signal). It is included in total_incl_other_t for city-level reference only.
